claims.claim: 専門ニッチ市場向け分散型ローカルブランチネットワーク（約45-50拠点）による高マージン担保貸付モデル
claims.evidence: CEO Preben Prebensen (H1 2014 prepared_remarks): 'We serve niche markets that require specialist expert knowledge and an in-depth understanding of our client needs. Our lenders operate out of nearly 50 locations, enabling us to build stronger, more focused relationships.' (FY2015): 'Our Banking business has a highly differentiated lending model targeting niche markets that require specialist knowledge and a local presence. We have a long-established distribution platform with a dedicated sales force of over 500 people.' Net interest margin stable at 8.6-8.8% over multiple years. 30-year track record of sustainable loan book growth including through financial crisis.

power_classification.benefit: NIM 8.6-8.8%という業界平均を大幅に上回る高マージン維持。30年間にわたるサイクル全体での持続的ローンブック成長（10年平均12%）。バッドデット比率0.7-1%という低水準維持
power_classification.barrier: 専門ニッチ市場への深い知識・関係構築は30年かけて構築。分散型45-50拠点ネットワークと500人超の専門営業部隊の構築には多大な時間と人材投資が必要。大手銀行は集中化モデルにシフト済みのため、このモデルを模倣する誘因がない

evidence_sources.speaker: Preben Prebensen
evidence_sources.quote: We serve niche markets that require specialist's expert knowledge and an in-depth understanding of our client's needs. Our lenders operate out of nearly 50 locations, enabling us to build stronger, more focused relationships with our customers and intermediaries.

evidence_sources.speaker: Preben Prebensen
evidence_sources.quote: Throughout this 30-year period, we've done what we always do: stuck to our specialist markets and maintained our robust and prudent lending model. The chart illustrates the ability of our business model to deliver consistent growth and strong returns through periods of recession and financial stress as well as both high and low interest rate environments.

adjustments.reason: 分散型ブランチネットワーク、500人専門営業部隊、ニッチ市場専門知識という「仕組み」への具体的言及あり。単なる結果ではなく仕組みが明確
大手銀行（Lloyds、Santander等）が集中化モデルに移行済みという明確な差別化。CEO自身が競合との比較で優位性を説明している
30年の実績とフルサイクルでの安定性は構造的な特性。金融危機時も無増資・無配当カットで乗り越えたという具体的証拠あり

claims.claim: Winterflood市場造成事業における専有プロプライエタリーテクノロジーとAIM市場でのリーダーシップ
claims.evidence: CEO (H1 2014 prepared_remarks): 'In Winterflood, a significant proportion of our employees are focused on IT and in-house development, supporting our leading market-making position.' (H1 2014): 'Winterflood has maintained its trading capacity throughout the difficult market conditions in the last 2 years. As a result, it has benefited from recovering risk appetite.' Jonathan (H1 2014): 'that cost model just hasn't changed at all over the last 10 years.' Winterflood provides continuous liquidity in all conditions. Just 1 loss day out of 128 trading days (H1 2014). ~20% of employees focused on technology.

power_classification.benefit: AIM市場のリーディング・マーケットメーカーとしての地位。128日中わずか1損失日という卓越したリスク管理実績。顧客固有の取引ソリューションを提供するカスタマイズ可能な電子取引システム
power_classification.barrier: 10年以上変わらないコストモデルと社内開発テクノロジー。300リテールおよび150機関投資家顧客との関係。専門のマーケットメーカーとしての技術的知識と市場理解は一朝一夕には構築不可能

evidence_sources.speaker: Preben Prebensen
evidence_sources.quote: In Winterflood, a significant proportion of our employees are focused on IT and in-house development, supporting our leading market-making position. Our fast and resilient electronic trading systems can be customized to the specific requirements of our clients.

evidence_sources.speaker: Preben Prebensen
evidence_sources.quote: Winterflood is a market maker, tailoring its offering through its client-specific requirements by combining the expertise of its staff with the technological advantages of its IT systems. It's committed to providing continuous liquidity in all conditions and maintaining its market-leading position.

adjustments.reason: 社内開発テクノロジー、20%の従業員がIT専従という「仕組み」への具体的言及。マーケットメーカーとしての専門的プロセスが説明されている
Winterfloodのマーケットメーキング事業は景気循環への高い感応性があり、市場条件依存度が高い。純粋競合他社（他のマーケットメーカー）との差別化の根拠が限定的

claims.claim: フルサイクルを通じた強力な資本・流動性ポジション維持能力（金融危機無増資達成）
claims.evidence: CEO (H1 2014): 'we came through the financial crisis without needing to recapitalize or cut our dividend.' (Q3 2015): 'Our capital ratios improved further during the year. The common equity Tier 1 ratio increased to 13.7%, and the leverage ratio increased to 10.2%.' Revenue growth 10-year track record with ROE of 18-19% and CET1 ratio 13%+. Jonathan (H1 2014): 'We borrow long and lend short.' Loan coverage 130%+ of loan book by funding at all times.

power_classification.benefit: 金融危機を無増資・無配当カットで乗り越えた唯一の英国中堅銀行グループとしての信頼性。CET1 13%+という高い資本水準。顧客への継続的貸出能力が65%リピート顧客率を支える
power_classification.barrier: 30年間にわたる一貫した資本管理哲学と慎重なアプローチ。「ロング・ファンディング、ショート・レンディング」原則を全期間維持する組織的規律。これを実践できる文化的・組織的能力は短期間では模倣困難

evidence_sources.speaker: Preben Prebensen
evidence_sources.quote: The group has maintained a strong financial position through the cycle, and we've always recognized the need to maintain a strong balance sheet and capital position. We came through the financial crisis without needing to recapitalize or cut our dividend.

evidence_sources.speaker: Preben Prebensen
evidence_sources.quote: 65% of our business is written to existing customers. This reliability creates significant customer loyalty.

adjustments.reason: 金融危機無増資という具体的事実。65%リピート顧客率。CET1 13.7%、Leverage ratio 10.2%という具体的資本指標
資本管理「哲学」と「原則」への明確な言及。単なる財務結果ではなく、それを可能にする組織的能力の説明あり

claims.claim: 資産運用部門の垂直統合モデル（アドバイス＋投資運用＋プラットフォーム）による高マージン顧客提案
claims.evidence: CEO (Q3 2014): 'We've built our proposition to provide clients with everything they need to create, implement and review their financial plan at any stage of their life. We have developed a vertically integrated model, founded on our core capabilities of financial planning, advice, research, investment management and platform technology.' Advised and managed assets generate twice investment management and platform income. These assets grew 54% over 3 years. Revenue margin improvement: 71bps (2011) → 84bps (2013) → 89bps (2014) → 88bps (2015). Operating margin improved to 15% by FY2015.

power_classification.benefit: アドバイスと運用の両方を提供する顧客は1つの関係から2倍以上の収益を生成。クライアントの財務計画全体を管理することで高い顧客粘着性を実現。リベニューマージン改善傾向（71bps→89bps）
power_classification.barrier: フィナンシャルプランニング→アドバイス→投資運用→プラットフォームの完全統合は、顧客が一旦依存すると移行コストが高い。複数チャネルにわたるデータと関係の蓄積が乗り換えを抑制

evidence_sources.speaker: Preben Prebensen
evidence_sources.quote: We have developed a vertically integrated model, founded on our core capabilities of financial planning, advice, research, investment management and platform technology. Managed and advised assets generated twice investment management and the platform income.

evidence_sources.speaker: Preben Prebensen
evidence_sources.quote: Total client assets were up 11% to GBP 10.8 billion. Assets that are both advised and managed grew by 14%. Managed assets grew by 18% in 2015.

adjustments.reason: AUM成長率やリベニューマージンは結果の提示が中心。垂直統合モデルそのものの説明はあるが、なぜ競合が模倣できないかの「仕組み」の説明が限定的
英国ウェルスマネジメント市場では、St. James's Place、Schroders等も統合モデルを展開。差別化根拠が不明確

claims.claim: 厳格な信用引受規律による低バッドデット率維持能力（10年平均1.5%、現在0.7%）
claims.evidence: Jonathan Howell (Q3 2015): 'The bad debt ratio continued to improve, reflecting our ongoing focus on credit quality.' Bad debt ratio: 1.0% (H1 2014) → 0.9% (FY2014) → 0.7% (H1 2015). 10-year average is 1.5%, cycle peak 2.6%. Stephen Hodges: 'our branch network, our service and our specialization protect us.' Jonathan (H1 2014): 'we've taken on extra 90 to 100 heads in the bank' to maintain high-touch model. Strong underwriting supported by 'predictable stable arrears and effective recoveries.'

power_classification.benefit: 景気サイクル全体を通じて業界最低水準のバッドデット比率を維持。これがNet Loan Book Return 3.7-4.0%という高い収益性を支える。ローンブックの品質は既存顧客65%リピート率にも反映
power_classification.barrier: 30年間にわたる信用引受の蓄積された規律と文化。ローカルブランチでの情報優位（ニッチ市場の深い理解）。各ビジネスが自らの貸倒れに責任を持つ分散型モデルが適切なインセンティブ構造を生む

evidence_sources.speaker: Jonathan Howell
evidence_sources.quote: The bad debt ratio continued to improve, reflecting our ongoing focus on credit quality and supported by the current low interest rates environment. This resulted in an excellent return on the loan book of 3.8%.

evidence_sources.speaker: Stephen Hodges
evidence_sources.quote: our branch network, our service and our specialization protect us, and we're very clear that we're going to stick to that model regardless of the competitive pressure.

adjustments.reason: バッドデット比率0.7%（10年平均1.5%比）という具体的数値。30年実績とフルサイクルでの安定性の定量的証拠
現在のバッドデット低水準は業界全体のサイクル的好況も反映。Close Brothersに特有の能力かどうかの判断が難しい
